name: case01_basic_03_pipe_no_header_job
description: Case 01 Variant 03: Pipe-delimited, no header, no footer, UTF-8. Reads case01_basic_20260408_03_NH_NF.txt, casts types using col0-col5, adds VERSION_DATE/ETL_UPDATE_DATE, writes gzip CSV to staging.
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - 03_NH_NF (pipe, no header)","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"col0","Type":"string"},{"Name":"col1","Type":"string"},{"Name":"col2","Type":"string"},{"Name":"col3","Type":"string"},{"Name":"col4","Type":"string"},{"Name":"col5","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case01_basic/case01_basic_20260408_03_NH_NF.txt"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":false,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":false}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SparkSQL - Cast and Transform (no header)","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"ID","Type":"bigint"},{"Name":"PREFIX","Type":"string"},{"Name":"FNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"LNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"AGE","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"BALANCE","Type":"decimal(18,2)"},{"Name":"VERSION_DATE","Type":"date"},{"Name":"ETL_UPDATE_DATE","Type":"timestamp"}]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col0), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(col1), '') AS PREFIX, NULLIF(TRIM(col2), '') AS FNAME, NULLIF(TRIM(col3), '') AS LNAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col4), '') AS SMALLINT) AS AGE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col5), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BALANCE, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE col0 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(col0) != ''"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case01_basic/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
